vision: Transform backlog refinement, review approvals, QE generation, and onboarding into a single guided workspace so the team can move from idea to sprint-ready work without losing context.
desiredOutcomes: Vision input is captured once and reused across planning stages.
Review gates stay visible before epics, features, and stories are approved.
Refinement notes become sprint-ready stories with explicit DoR checks.

reviewCheckpoints.label: Epic review
reviewCheckpoints.notes: Epics are aligned with the program lead vision.

reviewCheckpoints.label: Feature review
reviewCheckpoints.notes: Awaiting reviewer sign-off before stories are created.

epics.title: Capture program vision
epics.summary: Collect the program lead vision and normalize it into planning inputs.

epics.title: Manage review gates
epics.summary: Track approval checkpoints before the backlog moves forward.

epics.title: Enable onboarding and QE helpers
epics.summary: Provide document-grounded onboarding and automated test case generation.

features.title: Vision intake form
features.summary: Capture the vision, target users, and outcomes from the program lead.

features.title: Review checkpoint board
features.summary: Show epic and feature reviews before advancing work.

features.title: Refinement facilitation
features.summary: Turn messy notes into a sprint-ready user story package.

features.title: Test case generator
features.summary: Generate positive, negative, and edge-case tests from acceptance criteria.

features.title: Confluence-grounded onboarding agent
features.summary: Answer first-week questions using checked-in documentation first.

stories.title: Submit the planning vision
stories.summary: Create a plan from the program lead vision and selected target users.

stories.title: Approve epic review
stories.summary: Allow reviewers to approve epic decomposition after the vision is captured.

stories.title: Approve feature review
stories.summary: Gate story creation until feature review is complete.

stories.title: Run refinement facilitation
stories.summary: Transform refinement notes into the exact structured story format.

stories.title: Generate executable test cases
stories.summary: Create QE-ready cases from acceptance criteria with coverage gaps called out.

stories.title: Answer onboarding questions
stories.summary: Return document-backed onboarding guidance with citations.

onboardingChecklist: Definition of Done and Definition of Ready
